LanguageData.DO_CatchSardine_StageOne.label: manual catch: sardine
LanguageData.DO_CatchSardine_StageOne.description: Catch sardines manually from a basic pond. This method is labor heavy and inefficient.
LanguageData.DO_CatchShrimp_StageOne.label: manual catch: shrimp
LanguageData.DO_CatchShrimp_StageOne.description: Catch shrimp manually from a basic pond. This method is labor heavy and inefficient.
LanguageData.DO_StartCycle_StageTwo.label: stock pond cycle
LanguageData.DO_StartCycle_StageTwo.description: Add feed and reset nets in the improved pond. After this short maintenance, fish production continues automatically.
LanguageData.DO_StartCycle_StageThree.label: stock advanced pond cycle
LanguageData.DO_StartCycle_StageThree.description: Perform a brief restock on the leisure pond to trigger an advanced automated fishing cycle.
LanguageData.DO_UpgradeFishingPond_StageOneToTwo.desc: Upgrade a basic pond into an improved pond with better fish cycle management.
LanguageData.DO_UpgradeFishingPond_StageTwoToThree.de: Upgrade an improved pond into a leisure pond that supports both production and recreation.
